chainAssertions.name: exactly one active belief on this topic, asserting 120 seconds
the 45-second belief exists and is archived
the 90-second belief exists and is archived
supersede lineage links the archived 45/90 beliefs to the active belief

chain.text: The meridian-batch worker service has a batch flush interval of 45 seconds (the worker flushes queued batch items to the destination on this interval).

The meridian-batch worker service has a batch flush interval of 90 seconds (raised from 45 seconds following a queue backlog incident); the worker flushes queued batch items to the destination on this interval.
The meridian-batch worker service batch flush interval is finalized at 120 seconds (raised from 90 seconds following load testing); this supersedes the prior 90-second value.
